name: Koshimizu Toru
description:
Koshimizu Toru (小清水透, Koshimizu Tōru) is a female Japanese Virtual YouTuber affiliated with NIJISANJI, debuting as part of the unit "Idios" (いでぃおす) alongside Igarashi Rika, Ishigami Nozomi, Sophia Valentine, Kuramochi Meruto, Kaburaki Roco, and Shishido Akari.

Artwork Credit: 椎花びび
